description: Authoritative feasibility decision for infrastructure remediation planning.

feasible.description: Whether a safe, deterministic remediation and verification plan can be produced.

summary.description: Concise explanation of the feasibility decision.

blocking_reason.description: Reason remediation is not feasible. Must be null when feasible is true.

missing_context.description: Specific questions about missing parameters that would unblock feasibility. Empty if no questions or if fundamentally infeasible.
